title: DTU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant, Senior & Junior Project Assistant Posts
shortInfo: Delhi Technological University (DTU) has published the Sr. Project Assistant, Project Assistant, Jr. Project Assistant Notification 2026 on 19 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 6 Sr. Project Assistant, Project Assistant, Jr. Project Assistant positions. Candidates within the age limit of up to 50 years and holding a Master’s Degree or Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Science, Commerce, Business Administration, or related disciplines are eligible to apply through the official DTU website. The application process will remain active till 01-06-2026, and candidates can easily access th

basic_details.job_title: DTU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant, Senior & Junior Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Assistant, Senior & Junior Project Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Delhi Technological University (DTU) has published the Sr. Project Assistant, Project Assistant, Jr. Project Assistant Notification 2026 on 19 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 6 Sr. Project Assistant, Project Assistant, Jr. Project Assistant positions. Candidates within the age limit of up to 50 years and holding a Master’s Degree or Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering, Science, Commerce, Business Administration, or related disciplines are eligible to apply through the official DTU website. The application process will remain active till 01-06-2026, and candidates can easily access th

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for all posts is 50 years. Age relaxation, if any, shall be as per DTU/Govt. of NCT of Delhi norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/Business Administration or closely related discipline, Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/Business Administration
qualification.details: Sr. Project Assistant: A Master's Degree in Engineering/ Science/ Commerce/ Business Administration, or a closely related discipline with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, along with at least 3 years of experience in supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions/ or similar establishments. OR A Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/ Business Administration or a closely related discipline with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA with at least 5 years of experience in supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions / or similar establishments. Project Assistant: A Master’s Degree in Engineering/ Science/ Commerce/ Business Administration, or a closely related discipline with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, along with at least 1 year of experience in supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions/ or similar establishments. OR A Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/ Business Administration or a closely related discipline with a minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, along with at least 2 years of experience of supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions/ or similar establishments. Jr. Project Assistant: A Master’s Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/ Business Administration or a closely related discipline with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent CGPA. OR A Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/ Business Administration or a closely related discipline with minimum 55% marks or equivalent CGPA, along with at least 1 year of experience in supervisory work in Government organizations/ industry/ institutions/ or similar establishments.

salary_details.details: Sr. Project Assistant: ₹ 50,000/- (consolidated) Per Month Project Assistant: ₹ 40,000/- (consolidated) Per Month Jr. Project Assistant: ₹ 30,000/- (consolidated) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DTU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the DTU Recruitment 2026 is June 1, 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced by Delhi Technological University for the posts of Sr. Project Assistant, Project Assistant, and Jr. Project Assistant. These positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Sr. Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Sr. Project Assistant position, candidates need a Master's Degree in Engineering/Science/Commerce/Business Administration with at least 60% marks and 3 years of supervisory experience, or a Bachelor's Degree with 60% marks and 5 years of supervisory experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts at Delhi Technological University is 50 years. Age relaxation may be provided as per the norms of DTU and the Government of NCT of Delhi.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for DTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DTU Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Sr. Project Assistant, Project Assistant, and Jr. Project Assistant posts at DTU will involve two stages: initial shortlisting by a Scrutiny Committee, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary for the Project Assistant position at Delhi Technological University is ₹ 40,000/-. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q8. How should I send my application for DTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for DTU Recruitment 2026 must be submitted via email. Ensure you attach all necessary documents and clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of your email before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any desirable qualifications mentioned for the Jr. Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Jr. Project Assistant post, desirable qualifications include sufficient knowledge of Establishment & Administrative Matters, Maintenance of accounts, Purchase procedures, GFR, and rules of the Central/State Government.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for DTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for DTU Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
